name: Cocoa Chiffon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend cocoa and boiling water until cool.
2. Mix flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. Beat yolks with half the sugar.
4. In another bowl, beat egg whites with cream of tartar, gradually adding the remaining sugar until stiff peaks form.
5. Fold in yolk mixture and dry ingredients.
6. Spoon batter into an ungreased tube pan.
7. Bake for 65 minutes at 325°F.
8. Invert to cool.
